name: Microwave Peach Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree peaches in a food processor.
2. In a 2 quart microwave-safe bowl combine the pureed peaches, pectin and spices. Mix well.
3. Microwave on high for 6 minutes or until the mixture is very hot, stirring every two minutes.
4. Add sugar, blend well, and microwave on high for 5-6 minutes until the mixture comes to a rolling boil, stirring once during cooking.
5. Continue microwaving for an additional 1 minute.
6. Ladle into 4 clean 8 oz jars, leaving 1/2 inch headspace.
7. Cool slightly, cover with tight-fitting lids.
8. Cool several hours and store in the refrigerator up to 3 weeks or in the freezer for 3 months.
